title: -w- Ghasts
description: This changes the Happy Ghast(ling)'s face to a -w- face.
body:
# -w- Ghasts
This very simple Resource Pack changes the Happy Ghast(ling)'s -u- face into a -w- face.

I made this because, even though it's very simple, when I tried looking a pack like this, I came empty. I really wanted this resource pack though, so I made this myself.
